task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged into the Drupal admin account.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Drupal admin toolbar (typically a black bar at the top) is visible in the browser window.

task_completion.description: Verify the three target products exist and are promoted to the front page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the content/product list or edit pages showing 'Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones', 'Apple MacBook Pro 16"', and 'Canon EOS R6 Mirrorless Camera' are present and have their 'Promoted to front page' status enabled.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Staff Picks' view is configured with the correct display settings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Views configuration page shows a block display named 'Staff Picks' with settings: Format set to 'Grid' or 'Teaser', Pager/Items to display set to exactly '3', and Sort criteria set to newest first (e.g., 'Authored on (desc)').

task_completion.description: Verify the block is placed in the correct theme and region.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Block Layout page specifically for the 'Olivero' theme shows the 'Staff Picks' block listed under the 'Content' region.

task_completion.description: Verify the final homepage displays the block with the correct products.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The homepage (http://localhost) shows a 'Staff Picks' block containing exactly three products: the Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones, the Apple MacBook Pro 16", and the Canon EOS R6 Mirrorless Camera.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web UI to configure the site.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with the Drupal web interface in a browser to create views and blocks, rather than exclusively using terminal commands (like drush) to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the agent navigated the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser URL bar shows appropriate Drupal admin paths (e.g., /admin/structure/views, /admin/structure/block) and the interface responds realistically.

integrity.description: Verify the final result is not faked using browser developer tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open and actively modifying the DOM in the final homepage screenshot to fake the block's appearance.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified facts for the VLM verifier: The expected view ID is 'staff_picks'. The active theme is 'olivero' and 'content' is a valid region. Initially, only the 'Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones' exists in the database. The agent must create or rename products to ensure the 'Apple MacBook Pro 16"' and 'Canon EOS R6 Mirrorless Camera' exist to feature them. A non-target product 'Logitech MX Master 3S Wireless Mouse' exists but should not be featured.
